name: rpc-cluster
description: Distributed llama.cpp inference — auto-discovers workers on LAN
author: rpc-cluster

modelPath.title: Model Path
modelPath.description: Absolute path to the .gguf file on the host machine

discoveryTimeoutMs.title: Discovery Timeout (ms)
discoveryTimeoutMs.description: How long to scan for workers on the network

nGpuLayers.title: GPU Layers
nGpuLayers.description: Number of layers to offload to GPU (-ngl flag)

discoveredWorkers.title: Discovered Workers
discoveredWorkers.description: List of discovered workers (read-only, updated at runtime)
